mapper.sql: cover_image_url, gallery_images, name, location, address, user_name, phone, start_time, end_time, top_recommend, top_start_time, top_end_time, recommend_order, status, description, remark, customer_phone, customer_code_img, create_time
mapper.update:
UPDATE `shop`
cover_image_url = #{data.coverImageUrl},
gallery_images = #{data.galleryImages},
name = #{data.name},
location = #{data.location},
address = #{data.address},
user_name = #{data.userName},
phone = #{data.phone},
start_time = #{data.startTime},
end_time = #{data.endTime},
top_recommend = #{data.topRecommend},
top_start_time = #{data.topStartTime},
top_end_time = #{data.topEndTime},
top_consumption = #{data.topConsumption},
top_consumption_start_time = #{data.topConsumptionStartTime},
top_consumption_end_time = #{data.topConsumptionEndTime},
recommend_order = #{data.recommendOrder},
status = #{data.status},
description = #{data.description},
remark = #{data.remark},
merchant_id = #{data.merchantId},
rate = #{data.rate},
contract = #{data.contract},
customer_phone = #{data.customerPhone},
customer_code_img = #{data.customerCodeImg},
receipt_status = #{data.receiptStatus},
shop_status = #{data.shopStatus},
WHERE id = #{data.id} AND delete_time IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM shop WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_time IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE `shop` SET delete_time = null WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT id, name, status FROM `shop`
AND s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword}, '%')
AND s.status = #{param.searchIntStatus}
AND delete_time IS NULL
ORDER BY recommend_order DESC, id DESC

SELECT id AS shopId,name AS shopName,merchant_id AS merchantId FROM `shop`
AND merchant_id IN
#{item}
AND delete_time IS NULL

SELECT id AS shopId, name AS shopName, qualification_cert AS qualificationCert, shop_status AS shopStatus, status FROM `shop` WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND delete_time IS NULL ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE `shop` SET `top_recommend` = 0, `recommend_order` = 0 WHERE top_end_time <= #{checkTime} AND delete_time IS NULL
mapper.select:
SELECT id,cover_image_url,gallery_images as gallery_images_str,name,status,customer_phone,customer_code_img FROM `shop` WHERE id IN
#{item}
